examples: He unpolarized his faceplate and looked at her.
I used a pair of tinted safety goggles as part of the faceplate.
She stared at him as if she could see through his mirrored faceplate .
For a look at the faceplate and knob combos, jab the bordering source link.
Don't worry, as we mentioned yesterday, there are plenty of skins you can apply to the faceplate.
